intro.text: Hello, {player_name}. What do you want to do?

choices.text: Ask about the key you returned.

give_key.text: You found it. Thank you. I thought I had lost it forever.

ask_quest.text: I am still waiting for the old key. Please let me know if you find it.

after_key_given.text: Thanks again for returning the key. You really helped me.

leave.text: Alright. Come back if you need anything.
